opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My armpit is completely swollen with these agonizing lumps that are bursting and draining. I can't lift my arm at all because the pain is so sharp.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It's flared up really badly over the last two days, the pain is unbearable, I can't get dressed or sleep, and the lumps keep bursting and leaking smelly fluid — I need something for the pain and to know what to do.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 48 hours ago the right armpit flared up severely, on top of lumps I get in that area on and off
symptom_narrative.duration: the bad flare is 2 days old, but I've had these lumps come and go for about 5 years
symptom_narrative.character: deep, painful lumps that have joined into one big swollen tender mass; some of them burst on their own and leak thick, smelly fluid
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: absolutely agonizing — a sharp, throbbing pain that is the worst it's ever been
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: mainly my right armpit this time; I also get them in my left armpit and in my groin
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant since it flared; worse with any arm movement or when the skin rubs together
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: keeping my arm held out away from my body so nothing touches the armpit; nothing really takes the pain away
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: moving my arm, anything touching or rubbing the armpit, and getting dressed
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: no fever and no shivering, I don't feel hot or generally sick in myself — it's the pain and the swelling that are the problem; the smell and the discharge are really getting me down
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had painful lumps in my armpits and groin on and off for about 5 years; they flare up, some burst, and they've left scars and lumpy tunnel-like bits behind, but it's never been this bad
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't lift or use my right arm properly, I couldn't sleep, and I can't get dressed normally

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: recurrent painful lumps in my armpits and groin for about 5 years that flare, burst and leave scars

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: an antibiotic cream I put on my armpits every now and then when they flare

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: I'm a smoker. These lumps come up in the creases where my skin rubs — my armpits and groin — and rubbing and sweating seem to set them off. The recurring pain and the smell have really worn me down and affected my confidence and quality of life.

objective_data_offered.value: my right armpit is one big swollen, angry-red tender area with several deep lumps, and a few of them are open and weeping thick smelly fluid; there are old scars and raised lumpy tunnel-like bits and some paired blackhead-type spots from previous flares, and my left armpit has similar old scarring but it's quiet at the moment
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: described by the patient over video; not a clinician examination and not palpated

objective_data_offered.value: the lumps only ever come up in my armpits and groin — the skin-fold areas where things rub together
sitting holding my right arm out stiffly away from my side so nothing touches the armpit; visibly in a lot of pain and worn out from no sleep
I haven't taken my temperature but I don't feel hot, feverish or shivery — I don't feel unwell in myself, just in a lot of pain
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient impression only; no thermometer reading taken
